content.query:
/*

This document contains standards for how to create files in the data lake.  

ERP / Server  Database	 Abb   Server                        ID
DistOne       LIVE       ADC   AC-ERP1.adcraft.com           DistOne
Apprise       LIVE       APR   AVPBI01.avantiproducts.com    AppriseLIVE
Avanti        DW         ADW   AVPBI01.avantiproducts.com    AvantiDW
Avanti        WH         AWH   AVPBI01.avantiproducts.com    AvantiWH
NetSuite      VT         NET   AVPBI01.avantiproducts.com    NetSuiteVT
ECVisual      DC24       EDA   ECS-VSQL3.westbend.local      ECVisualDC24
ECVisual      VFIN       ECV   ECS-VSQL3.westbend.local      ECVisualVFIN
ECVisual      VMFG       ECM   ECS-VSQL3.westbend.local      ECVisualVMFG
MAS           VT         MAV   MASSERVER01.vt.local          MASVT
MAS           GWT        MAG   Syspro61.greenfieldworld.com  MASGWT
Syspro        CompanyA   SCA   Syspro61.greenfieldworld.com  SysproCompanyA
Syspro        CompanyG   SCG   Syspro61.greenfieldworld.com  SysproCompanyG
Syspro        CompanyK   SCK   Syspro61.greenfieldworld.com  SysproCompanyK
Syspro        CompanyL   SCL   Syspro61.greenfieldworld.com  SysproCompanyL
Syspro        CompanyO   SCO   Syspro61.greenfieldworld.com  SysproCompanyO
Syspro        CRMLive    SCR   Syspro61.greenfieldworld.com  SysproCRMLive
WBVisual      DCSPARKS   WDS   WBS-VSQL3.westbend.local      WBVisualDCSPARKS
WBVisual      DCPARIS    WDP   WBS-VSQL3.westbend.local      WBVisualDCPARIS
WBVisual      VMFG       WBM   WBS-VSQL3.westbend.local      WBVisualVMFG
Infor CSDE M3 M3         M3    CloudERP                      M3

Schema	Source System	Division / Brand
ADC - Distribution One - AdCraft
ADW - Avanti DW - Avanti
APR - Apprise - Avanti
AWH - Avanti WH - Avanti
ECM - Visual VMFG (EC) - Consumer
ECV - Visual VFIN - Consumer
EDA - Visual DCMS (DC24) - Consumer
M3  - M3 - ALL
MAG - MAS GWT - GWT
MAV - MAS VT - Vinotemp
NET - Netsuite - Vinotemp
SCA - Syspro Company A - AFS
SCG - Syspro Company G - GWT
SCK - Syspro Company K - Kold Draft
SCL - Syspro Company L - Zeroll
SCO - Syspro Company O - Omega
SCR - Syspro CRM - AFS
SLS - Salsify - ALL
WBM - Visual VMFG (WB) - Westbend
WDP - Visual DCMS (DCPARIS) - Consumer
WDS - Visual DCMS (DCSPARKS) - Consumer

Examples of File Name Conventions

Data Lake File Name                    SQL External Name Name
/ERPDatabase/OriginalDBFile.parquet  > ABB.OrignalDBFile
/AppriseLIVE/ap-ctl.parquet          > APR.ap-ctl
/SysproCompanyG/ApBank.parquet       > SCG.ApBank
/ECVisualVMFG/CUSTOMER_ORDER.parquet > ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER

------ Data Inventory

Folder	          Notes
AdCraft	          Distribution One ERP (Not Full Set of Data from that System - Source is Progress DB)
AppriseLIVE	      Aptean Apprise ERP
AvantiDW	      Some BI Files from Tableau over Apprise
AvantiWH	      Some BI Files from Tableau over Apprise
ECVisualDC24	  Visual DCMS Avondale Database
ECVisualVFIN	  Visual VFIN Database
ECVisualVMFG	  Visual VMFG Database
M3	              M3
MASGWT	          Sage MAS Database for Old GWT
MASVT	          Sage MAS Database for Old Vinotemp (Not Done Yet)
NetsuiteVT	      NetSuite ERP (Migrated to M3 - There is a folder called Backup which has ALL files Backup)
SysproCompanyA	  Syspro ERP (We have Multiple Instance for Different Parts of our Operation)
SysproCompanyG	  Syspro ERP
SysproCompanyK	  Syspro ERP
SysproCompanyL	  Syspro ERP
SysproCompanyO	  Syspro ERP
SysproCRMLive	  Syspro CRM
WBVisualDCPARIS	  Visual DCMS Paris Database
WBVisualDCSPARKS  Visual DCMS Sparks Database
WBVisualVMFG	  Visual VMFG (Historical for Westbend)


--List Views on System
SELECT s.name, o.name, definition
FROM sys.objects o
INNER JOIN sys.sql_modules m ON o.object_id = m.object_id
INNER JOIN sys.schemas AS s ON o.schema_id = s.schema_id
WHERE type = 'V' and s.name='SLS'

--List of External Tables
SELECT s.name AS SchemaName,
       t.name AS TableName,
       t.location as DataSource,
       t.type_desc AS TableType
FROM sys.external_tables AS t
INNER JOIN sys.schemas AS s ON t.schema_id = s.schema_id
WHERE s.name = 'SLS'

*/
